description: Environmental disturbances and sensory distortions in the item's vicinity. What it does to the world around you.
limitations: Booming Voice
The wielder's voice swells to a thunderous volume. Whispers become shouts and shouts become earthquakes.
Storm Caller
Lightning bends toward it during storms. Carrying it in bad weather is a gamble against the sky itself.
Iron Grasp
Nearby metal weapons lurch toward it like obedient hounds. Blades and buckles stick fast before pulling free.
Sourfield
Milk curdles, bread goes stale, and fresh food rots in its presence. Provisions do not last long nearby.
Beast Fury
Animals nearby bristle and bare teeth. Horses bolt, dogs snarl, and even songbirds scatter in panic.
Broken Hours
Clocks spin backward, candles burn in reverse, and the flow of time stutters in a small radius around the item.
Blighttouch
Green things shrivel and blacken nearby. Druids sense it from miles away and arrive furious.
Phantom Bells
Faint chiming follows every use. No source, no visible bells, just a clear ringing that draws curious ears.
Poltergeist Wake
Small objects near the wielder drift upward and hover, spinning lazily before clattering back down.
Wrong Way
The wielder's footprints face backward. Trackers follow the trail in the wrong direction, but so does the wielder.
Rogue Shadow
The wielder's shadow moves independently. It mimics enemies, reaches for objects, and occasionally waves at strangers.
Lagging Shadow
The shadow trails behind by a heartbeat. Observers notice and find it deeply unsettling.
Rust Touch
Mundane metal corrodes on contact. Coins tarnish, blades dull, and buckles crumble in the wielder's pockets.
Foul Bloom
A thick, pungent smell erupts with each activation. Unmistakable and impossible to mask.
Echo Chamber
The wielder's last sentence repeats as a ghostly whisper, hanging in the air for anyone nearby to hear.
Dim Carry
Every light source the wielder holds gutters and fades to half its strength. Torches flicker, lanterns dim.
Gray Veil
Color drains from everything nearby. Flowers fade, fabrics dull, and the world becomes a washed-out sketch.
Thought Leak
Faint whispers spill from the item, echoing the wielder's private thoughts for anyone close enough to hear.
Flame Snuffer
Every non-magical fire nearby dies the moment the item is drawn. Torches, candles, campfires, all gone.
Fogged Glass
Mirrors near the wielder cloud over. Reflections vanish, which stops certain magic but raises many questions.
Sneeze Hex
Someone nearby erupts in a violent sneeze every time the item activates. Never the wielder. Always someone else.
Wild Surge
The magic is unstable. Each use sends a ripple of chaotic energy outward with unpredictable results.
Forced Praise
Nearby allies feel an overwhelming urge to shout compliments at the wielder. Resisting is surprisingly difficult.
Flash Freeze
Fresh water turns to ice at its touch. Puddles crack, canteens freeze solid, and rain becomes sleet nearby.
Guilt Weight
The item grows heavier with the wielder's unspoken regrets. Some days it can barely be lifted.
Liar's Lamp
It glows near enemies, which is useful. It also glows when friends are lying, which is not.
Magic Hum
It vibrates and hums near enchanted objects. Useful for finding them, terrible for staying hidden.
Gravity Slip
A fumble and gravity reverses for the wielder alone. A brief, terrifying fall upward before slamming back down.
Scrambled Text
Written words within arm's reach twist and mirror themselves. Reading becomes a puzzle until you walk away.
Spore Trail
Faintly glowing spores drift from the wielder's path, visible in darkness. Beautiful and impossible to hide.
Bright Steps
Glowing footprints mark every step for several minutes. Following the wielder requires no skill at all.
Death Mark
A sigil appears on the wielder's skin, visible only to the undead. They notice. They always notice.
Stone Scar
The ground hardens to stone underfoot after each use. A permanent trail of petrified earth.
Bare Aura
A shimmering field surrounds the wielder that no illusion can conceal. Stealth and disguise fail in its glow.
Thunderclap
A deafening crack of sound announces every activation. Stealth is not an option.
Moth Veil
A cloud of pale moths erupts on failure, swarming the wielder's face and blocking their view.
Stranger's Reflection
The wielder's reflection becomes someone else entirely. It watches from mirrors with unfamiliar eyes until sunrise.
Glass Shatter
Nearby glass explodes into dust when the item activates. Windows, vials, spectacles, nothing survives.
Paper Singe
Tiny harmless sparks leap from the item and find paper. Letters char, maps smolder, and scrolls curl at the edges.
Imp's Mockery
A small impish figure appears after each use, heckling the wielder with surprisingly personal insults before vanishing.
Spectral Flock
Ghostly birds erupt from the item at the best moments, circling and calling in transparent confusion.
North Lost
Compasses spin wildly nearby. Maps become suggestions and navigation becomes guesswork.
Loose Lips
The item whispers the wielder's plans and secrets at the worst possible times. It has no sense of discretion.
Evil Beacon
Dark things stir when it is used. It sends a signal into places better left undisturbed.
Loud Narrator
The item announces what it does, out loud, in a clear voice. It is proud of its abilities and wants everyone to know.
Time Ripple
Small temporal hiccups follow each use. A word repeated, a step retraced, a moment lived twice.
Toxic Residue
Each use leaves behind a spreading, harmful substance. The longer it is used, the worse the contamination.
Coveted
Everyone who sees it wants it. Allies get possessive, strangers get bold, and thieves get creative.
Notorious
Its silhouette is famous. People recognize it on sight, and not all of them are friendly.
Boom
It announces itself with a sharp, unmistakable crack of sound. Subtlety was never part of its design.
Signal Flare
The enemy knows exactly where you are the moment you use it. The item sends out a pulse they can follow.
Stolen Heirloom
A powerful creature considers this rightfully theirs. They are looking, and they are getting closer.
Thief Magnet
Thieves sense it the way sharks sense blood. The item draws the worst kind of attention wherever it goes.
Mark of Shame
Carrying it earns disgust. Society has long memories, and this item carries a reputation no one wants to share.
